prompt.content:
Grab the 1) SI DBQ week 1 practice and 2) How the Dominoes Fell files and review the 3) attached report card for Liam in particular.

I'll need you to draft a letter as a new doc. First determine which letter format is appropriate for Liam from the Exceeds Standards format (level 3 on exit and grade >85%), Meets Standards format (level 2 exit and grade between 80%-85%), or Approaching Standards format (level 2 and grade below 80%). The header must include the date, "February 12th, 2024"; Subject line: "AP US History Update: [Corresponding Letter Name]"; addressed as: "To Liam Martinez's Parent"
The body of the letter should include: 
    1- A summary of the Teacher Annotation found on Liam's exit ticket.
    2- A reminder to complete the end-of-term assignment from the Road to War Unit.

rubrics.name: States that the Approaching Standards letter is the correct option for Liam (ver_a7997b6f169d4427b944946424a670d2)

messages.content: States that the Approaching Standards letter is the correct option for Liam.
